description: Phoenix Supply Chain Firewall — Codex CLI hook configuration
instructions: Place in ~/.codex/hooks.json to enable firewall checks on install commands.

PreToolUse.match: (npm install|npm add|pip install|yarn add|pnpm add|cargo add|gem install|uv pip install|poetry add)

handler.description: Evaluates packages against Phoenix firewall before install. Reuses the same shell script as Claude Code — set PHOENIX_API_KEY and optionally PHOENIX_API_URL / PHOENIX_STRICT env vars.

on_deny.message: Package blocked by Phoenix Supply Chain Firewall policy.
